summary: Stupendous front‑of‑house tape with a patched‑up peak of China Rider, delivering excellent audio quality.
review: The reviewer gushes that the front‑of‑house recording sounds stupendous and especially appreciates the patch applied to the high point of “China Rider.” No complaints are noted about performance or other tracks, indicating overall satisfaction with both the show’s highlight and the tape’s clarity after the fix.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the recording highly; lacking multiple opinions on the musical performance keeps confidence at medium, but the strong endorsement drives a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house (FOB) tape recorded with Schoeps mics; reviewer describes it as "stupendous" and notes successful patching of the China Rider peak.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; focus is on the patched highlight, implying the performance was at least satisfactory.
